description: Dynamic bridge between scheduled runs for April 15 session

market_regime.label: BLOCKADE_ESCALATION_STABILIZED
market_regime.key_risk: US naval blockade holding. Brent $102 baseline. April 22 deadline. War premium durable through week but no imminent catalysts April 15.
market_regime.dominant_risk: Any geopolitical incident over April 14-15 (even if market closed April 14) could shift regime.
market_regime.regime_note: April 13 session: Nifty recovered from -1.92% gap to -0.91% close. War premium stabilized. April 14 is market holiday. April 15: Base case is range consolidation at war premium baseline.

key_drivers: Overnight S&P 500 weakness on Hormuz blockade (expect -0.5% to -1.5%)
Brent crude stable to up in $101-104 range (Asian morning risk-off buyers)
Overnight FII flow: likely continued selling (de-risking geopolitical exposure)
Domestic: No major catalysts April 14 (holiday), limited overnight news
opening_bias.logic: Gap-down expected due to geopolitical hold-steady mode. Not a crash, but cautious opening. War premium is now BASELINE expectation, not surprise shock.

session_direction.key_assumption: War premium stabilized at Brent $102. No new escalation event overnight or April 15 morning. Base case: range consolidation. April 22 deadline drives next major move.

relief_scenario.description: Trump extends talks/delay to May (offshore risk reduction)

key_risks: Iran IRGC 'last warning' — any incident triggers -$3-5 crude spike
Trump April 22 deadline — markets may frontrun hawkish positioning this week
FII flows — sustained selling on geopolitical risk could exacerbate Nifty weakness
key_opportunities: Defense stocks: ASTRA_MICRO, LT, HAL likely outperformers (war premium durable)
Gold/Pharma: Safe havens tracking. PHARMA index consolidating, not selling
Banking/PSU sector: Oversold on Oil & Gas concerns. Bounce potential on consolidation

stocks_to_watch.thesis: War premium durable. P012 target (₹1,050-1,080) already exceeded at ₹1,132. Take profits on intraday rallies above ₹1,140.
Oversold on oil & gas weakness. April 15 consolidation bounce likely (support ₹430-440)
P010 range target ₹95-100. At ₹100.25 already, slight pullback expected before next leg.
P023 tracking ₹130-134 in geopolitical risk-off mode. Gold bullish on war premium sustained.
Oversold on oil spike. P015 support ₹4,150. Bounce potential if Brent stabilizes.
